summary: Tested new Meeting and Action Item feature addition for Engagement Pulse app. All 24 backend API tests pass. Frontend testing confirmed: Meeting CRUD, Action Item CRUD, meeting type selection, marking meetings complete opens action item dialog, meetings & actions block in 4-blocker overview, text size is 16.5px. Fixed missing Meetings & Actions block in EngagementDetail.jsx 4-blocker.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent

action_items: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components to fix accessibility warnings (LOW priority)
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/EngagementDetail.jsx - Added Meetings & Actions block to 4-Blocker Overview (was missing)
/app/backend/tests/test_meetings_action_items_api.py - Created comprehensive API test for Meetings and Action Items CRUD
seed_data_creation: Created test meetings and action items during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meeting and Action Item features fully implemented and tested. Meetings tab shows CLIENT_CALL, INTERNAL_SYNC, STEERING_COMMITTEE, WORKSHOP, REVIEW, OTHER types. Action Items have OPEN/IN_PROGRESS/DONE statuses and LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH priorities. Marking meeting complete auto-opens action item dialog with meeting pre-linked. 4-blocker shows meetings_block and action_items_block in API response and UI.

backend_api.POST /api/meetings: PASS - Creates meeting with all types
backend_api.POST /api/action-items: PASS - Creates standalone and meeting-linked action items

frontend_ui.landing_page_login: PASS - Log In button reveals login form
frontend_ui.engagement_detail_tabs: PASS - Has Meetings and Actions tabs in tab bar
frontend_ui.meetings_tab: PASS - Shows meetings list with Add Meeting button
frontend_ui.add_meeting_dialog: PASS - Meeting type selector works (CLIENT_CALL, etc.)
frontend_ui.mark_meeting_complete: PASS - Opens Action Item dialog with meeting pre-linked
frontend_ui.action_items_tab: PASS - Shows action items with priority/status badges
frontend_ui.add_action_item_dialog: PASS - Priority, status, linked meeting selectors work
frontend_ui.edit_action_item: PASS - Can change status to DONE
frontend_ui.delete_functionality: PASS - Delete buttons exist for both meetings and action items
frontend_ui.4blocker_overview: PASS - Shows Meetings & Actions block with stats
frontend_ui.text_size: PASS - Root font-size is 16.5px (larger than default)
